series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of a Invitation to Bid (ADM-3214) listing the agency name, bidders name, description and specifications of the bid and the bid number submitted by all vendors for a specific project. Included are working papers, copies of corresponde

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 fiscal year after all proposals (successful and unseccessful) have been submitted, then transfer to storage for 4 fiscal years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
